requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Turkmenistan BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为土库曼斯坦BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為土庫曼斯坦BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Turkmenistan does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or a dedicated IEC 62619 certification regime. The national standards body is Turkmenstandartlary (Main State Service for Standardisation, Metrology and State Supervision), which issues domestic conformity marks and oversees technical regulations. Critically, Turkmenistan is NOT a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU); accordingly, EAC (Eurasian Conformity) certification and EAEU Technical Regulations (TR CU) do not apply and should not be claimed as the conformity route for Turkmenistan. The domestic Turkmenstandartlary conformity pathway — which adopts or adapts international IEC standards — is the applicable route. For BESS cells and modules, IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard referenced in utility-scale and project-level specifications. Turkmenenergo (the state electricity monopoly) and international EPC contractors operating in Turkmenistan's energy sector are expected to require IEC 62619 compliance evidence as a technical prerequisite for project acceptance. Exporters must verify the current Turkmenstandartlary regulated-product list and applicable conformity assessment procedures directly with the authority before shipment.
summary.zh: 土库曼斯坦尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》或专用IEC 62619认证制度相当。国家标准机构为Turkmenstandartlary（国家标准化、计量和国家监督主管服务机构），负责颁发国内合格标志并监督技术法规。关键在于，土库曼斯坦并非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员；因此，EAC（欧亚合格评定）认证和EAEU技术法规（TR CU）不适用，不应将其声称为土库曼斯坦的合格评定路径。适用路径为国内Turkmenstandartlary合格评定途径——采纳或改编IEC国际标准。对于BESS电芯和模组，IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是公用事业规模和项目级规格中引用的国际预期安全标准。土库曼斯坦能源领域的国家电力垄断企业Turkmenenergo及国际EPC承包商，预计将以IEC 62619合规证据作为项目验收的技术前提。出口商在出货前须直接向主管机关核实现行Turkmenstandartlary受监管产品清单及适用的合格评定程序。
summary.zht: 土庫曼斯坦尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》或專用IEC 62619認證制度相當。國家標準機構為Turkmenstandartlary（國家標準化、計量和國家監督主管服務機構），負責頒發國內合格標誌並監督技術法規。關鍵在於，土庫曼斯坦並非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員；因此，EAC（歐亞合格評定）認證和EAEU技術法規（TR CU）不適用，不應將其聲稱為土庫曼斯坦的合格評定路徑。適用路徑為國內Turkmenstandartlary合格評定途徑——採納或改編IEC國際標準。對於BESS電芯和模組，IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是公用事業規模和項目級規格中引用的國際預期安全標準。土庫曼斯坦能源領域的國家電力壟斷企業Turkmenenergo及國際EPC承包商，預計將以IEC 62619合規證據作為項目驗收的技術前提。出口商在出貨前須直接向主管機關核實現行Turkmenstandartlary受監管產品清單及適用的合格評定程序。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Turkmenistan project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)

Turkmenstandartlary — Main State Service for Standardisation, Metrology and State Supervision of Turkmenistan (verify current regulated product list and applicable conformity assessment procedures directly; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific technical regulation as of dataset date)
NOTE: Turkmenistan is NOT an EAEU member — EAC/TR CU certification does not apply and confers no market-access rights in Turkmenistan

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), replacing the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters. GB 38031 (Electric Vehicles Traction Battery Safety Requirements) is sometimes referenced for cell-level mechanical and chemical abuse testing but is automotive-focused and not a BESS system standard. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Turkmenenergo project specifications or international project acceptance reviews. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。GB 38031（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求）有时被引用用于电芯级机械和化学滥用测试，但属于汽车领域标准，并非BESS系统标准。上述中国标准不被Turkmenenergo项目规格或国际项目验收审查接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。GB 38031（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求）有時被引用用於電芯級機械和化學濫用測試，但屬於汽車領域標準，並非BESS系統標準。上述中國標準不被Turkmenenergo項目規格或國際項目驗收審查接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (Electric Vehicles Traction Battery Safety Requirements; automotive-focused, not a BESS system standard)

gap.en: Critical gap: Turkmenenergo project specifications and international EPC contractors reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications. Additionally, EAC/TR CU certification — applicable in Russia and EAEU member states — is explicitly inapplicable in Turkmenistan, which is not an EAEU member. Exporters should: (a) verify the current Turkmenstandartlary regulated-product list for any mandatory pre-shipment conformity obligation; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Turkmenistan BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification or Turkmenenergo connection agreement before committing to a test programme; (d) do NOT claim EAC/TR CU certification as a market-access route for Turkmenistan.
gap.zh: 关键差距：Turkmenenergo项目规格和国际EPC承包商将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据。此外，适用于俄罗斯和EAEU成员国的EAC/TR CU认证在非EAEU成员国土库曼斯坦明确不适用。出口商应：（a）核实现行Turkmenstandartlary受监管产品清单，确认是否存在强制装运前合格评定义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至土库曼斯坦BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或Turkmenenergo并网协议中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）切勿将EAC/TR CU认证声称为土库曼斯坦的市场准入路径。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：Turkmenenergo項目規格和國際EPC承包商將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據。此外，適用於俄羅斯和EAEU成員國的EAC/TR CU認證在非EAEU成員國土庫曼斯坦明確不適用。出口商應：（a）核實現行Turkmenstandartlary受監管產品清單，確認是否存在強制裝運前合格評定義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至土庫曼斯坦BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格或Turkmenenergo併網協議中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）切勿將EAC/TR CU認證聲稱為土庫曼斯坦的市場准入路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where Turkmenenergo or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; Turkmenstandartlary mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS has not been confirmed — verify directly with Turkmenstandartlary; EAC/TR CU does NOT apply (Turkmenistan is not an EAEU member)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Turkmenistan as of the dataset date; IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Turkmenenergo project specifications. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Turkmenistan project acceptance. EAC/TR CU certification does not apply — Turkmenistan is not an EAEU member. Verify Turkmenstandartlary current regulated-product scope and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, Turkmenenergo, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，土库曼斯坦尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；IEC 62619是Turkmenenergo项目规格中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足土库曼斯坦项目验收要求。EAC/TR CU认证不适用——土库曼斯坦并非EAEU成员。出货前请核实Turkmenstandartlary现行受监管产品范围，并向项目业主、Turkmenenergo及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，土庫曼斯坦尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；IEC 62619是Turkmenenergo項目規格中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足土庫曼斯坦項目驗收要求。EAC/TR CU認證不適用——土庫曼斯坦並非EAEU成員。出貨前請核實Turkmenstandartlary現行受監管產品範圍，並向項目業主、Turkmenenergo及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。
